title: Anime Paintings
description: This project changes All the paintings to a anime character.
body:
Introduction: This Painting-only resource pack is themed around a few shows. You can use it with other resource packs by placing it on top.

## Hightlight

![Paintings Preview 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bnCO6f2x/images/87c35fcd5162a60db208f63e3e43f314e1ccb539.png)

**Additional Resources:**
- Check out more content on [My Website](https://serkan00900.github.io/Anime-packs/)
- Join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/83SJPnncCA) server to suggest new packs, vote on upcoming designs, and join anime discussions.
Thank you for your support! ❤️

## Screenshots

![Paintings Preview 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bnCO6f2x/images/91b759da807bb5bb90d9f6f82cd4f4532b042379.png)

![Paintings Preview 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bnCO6f2x/images/bfea042cfc1ced95d0a1fa5a34287eba6d2619c8.png)

![Paintings Preview 4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bnCO6f2x/images/36df2ce19450ae8fffb3b0bec87289bf56d7f28b.png)
